examples: These entities, even while occupying a body, could transmute matter.
That is all you need for your protection, as it will deflect or transmute the dark energies.
It will in time transmute or disintegrate, as a point will be reached when it cannot remain any longer.
Mr Jones's ability to transmute a complex century into some 600 pages of fast-paced and lucid prose is exemplary.
Those who believed the 2010 merger of seven savings banks, or cajas, laden with toxic property would transmute into a solid new bank were wrong.
